Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 228 

PART_D_LIS_75 

LABEL: Part D Low Income Subsidy 75% 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the Part D low-income subsidy (LIS) where the subsidy level is 
75%. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PART_D_LIS_75 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The width of this value changed from 12 to 8 in 2009. 

The CCW constructs the Plan
